headline: How The Cardlytics (CDLX) Narrative Is Resetting After Guidance Changes And Partner Exits
summary: Cardlytics is back in focus after its latest fair value estimate was trimmed from US$1.29 to US$1.04, pointing to a lower price target in the updated analyst narrative. Much of this reset is being linked directly to Q4 results, Q1 guidance, and the revenue implications of the BofA exit and Bridg divestiture, which have pushed analysts to mark expectations closer to current realities. Reading on, you will see how bullish and bearish voices are framing these changes and how you can track the...

headline: How The Sabre (SABR) Investment Story Is Shifting As Expectations And Fair Value Reset
summary: Sabre’s fair value estimate has been revised lower from US$2.13 to US$1.91, indicating a more restrained central valuation in the latest analyst update. This shift aligns with research that now incorporates more conservative assumptions on longer term growth, bookings and free cash flow, even as some analysts still see room for Sabre to outperform parts of the Global Distribution System market. As you read on, you will see how these changing views fit together and what to watch as the story...
